scripts.build: npm install && npm run build-piano_daemon && npm run build:es
scripts.prepackage: npm run build-piano_daemon && npm install && node scripts/prepackage.js
scripts.build:es: esbuild main.js --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/main.js --external:electron && npm --prefix ./www/server run build:es && npm --prefix ./www/client run build:es && npm run copy:assets
scripts.package-win32-x64: npx electron-packager ./dist depinus --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --extra-resource=depinus.conf --extra-resource=depinus.db --extra-resource=dist/piano_daemon.exe --extra-resource=scripts/autostart.bat --extra-resource=www/server/api/images --out=package --overwrite && npm run postpackage
scripts.package-linux-x64: npx electron-packager ./dist depinus --platform=linux --arch=x64 --extra-resource=depinus.conf --extra-resource=depinus.db --extra-resource=dist/piano_daemon --extra-resource=scripts/autostart --extra-resource=scripts/midi_usb_reset --extra-resource=scripts/midi_usb_reset_daemon.sh --extra-resource=www/server/api/images --out=package --overwrite && npm run postpackage
scripts.package-linux-arm64: npx electron-packager ./dist depinus --platform=linux --arch=arm64 --extra-resource=depinus.conf --extra-resource=depinus.db --extra-resource=dist/piano_daemon --extra-resource=scripts/autostart --extra-resource=scripts/midi_usb_reset --extra-resource=scripts/midi_usb_reset_daemon.sh --extra-resource=www/server/api/images --out=package --overwrite && npm run postpackage
